meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Antigravity Project Template for Advanced AI Apps
content.seo_description: Break through your coding plateau. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build professional, scalable AI applications today.
content.answer_block: Break past the tutorial hell cycle by adopting an industrial-grade project architecture. The Antigravity template provides a modular, production-ready framework that forces you to handle state, error boundaries, and API orchestration—the exact skills senior engineers prioritize. Use Claude Code to automate the boilerplate and focus on core logic.
content.intro:
You’ve built the to-do lists and the weather apps. Now, the silence of the blank IDE feels heavier because you know you’re capable of more, yet the jump to production-level architecture feels like a leap over a canyon. You are caught in the 'tutorial trap,' where every project feels like a script rather than a system.

It is time to pivot from hacking code to engineering software. The Antigravity project template is your bridge, designed to enforce robust design patterns that distinguish a student project from a professional SaaS. By integrating Claude Code, you shift from manual labor to architectural oversight, building apps that don't just run, but scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a production-grade directory structure that separates concerns between data fetching, UI state, and business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity standard layout, including separate folders for /lib, /hooks, /api, and /types. Ensure strict TypeScript configuration is enabled.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Before writing functions, define your data schemas to ensure type safety across the entire application stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unified data model for an AI-powered task manager. Define the interface for Task and User objects with Zod schemas for runtime validation.

steps.title: Implement API Middleware
steps.description: Secure your application by building middleware that handles authentication and rate limiting before requests reach your logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity middleware layer to intercept all /api calls, validate JWT tokens, and inject a request logger for debugging.

steps.title: Orchestrate AI Logic
steps.description: Connect your frontend to an LLM provider using the template's built-in streaming patterns to maintain a snappy UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement an AI streaming service using the Antigravity provider pattern. Ensure the response handler supports partial updates to the UI state.

steps.title: Automated Testing Suite
steps.description: Generate integration tests for your core modules to ensure your app stays robust as you add new features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Vitest unit tests for the newly created AI service. Mock the API responses and verify the error boundary handling.

pro_tips: Always treat your API keys as environment variables; use a .env.example file to document required keys without exposing secrets.
Leverage the Antigravity hook-generator to keep your business logic outside of your UI components, maintaining clean React trees.
Use Claude Code to perform 'diff-based refactoring' rather than regenerating entire files, preserving your custom logic.
Implement a custom 'Error Boundary' component early in the project to prevent silent failures during AI streaming.
Periodically run the 'audit' command in your CLI to identify performance bottlenecks in your dependency tree.
content.next_steps: Once your core functionality is live, deploy your project to a staging environment (like Vercel or Railway) and implement monitoring to track your first real-world users.
content.conversion_block: You have the blueprint, the tools, and the professional mindset. Stop waiting for the 'perfect' time to start; build the project that defines your career. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
